title: CANCER INFORMATION SERVICE - 211info
text: NATIONAL CANCER INSTITUTE CONTACT CENTER CANCER INFORMATION SERVICE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides information about cancer, referral services, and support for smoking/vaping cessation. Confidential Address Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-6pm Email (800) 422-6237 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (800) 422-6237 (800) 448-7848 Smoking Quit Line Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Medical Information Services * Cancer Smoking/Vaping Cessation Smoking/Vaping Cessation Support Specialized Information and Referral * Cancer If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NATIONAL CANCER INSTITUTE CONTACT CENTER
